title: Foundation: config/audit gate #1
purpose: Validate `MnemoConfig.swift` rejects cloud hosts, LAN binds, and backing-store mismatch at startup with tested exit codes 3/0.

title: Foundation: config/audit gate #2
purpose: Extend `LoopbackAudit.swift` to parse `lsof` output for Rivet/smfs edge ports; document in `mnemoctl audit` help.
